strongest_supported_readings: Absolute performance and control-relative contribution diverge materially on the annual surface.
The late low-zone bars-8+ pocket is recurrent but sign-unstable and therefore not a standalone discriminator.
Blocked baseline-long quality inversion is the strongest repeated anti-edge boundary on the current retained annual proxy surface.
Control-positive annual periods lean continuation-dominant while control-negative periods lean suppressor-heavier on the bounded primary cohort.
The frozen monthly exact-subject seam is real but local and sign-mixed rather than universally directional.
open_contradictions: 2024 is the strongest absolute full year while still being control-negative and drawdown-worse than control.
2018-03 has the largest local behavioral drift in the exact month triad while still being the negative subject.
